programs.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programs.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick as a nation.

programs.title: Clarkson's Farm
programs.desc: There's a big new arrival at the farm, a much smaller one down in the pig pens, and it looks as though the pub search might finally be over.

programs.title: 9News Late
programs.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of today's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programs.title: The Grand Tour
programs.desc: Confined to the UK by Covid, Jeremy, Richard and James embark on a Lockdown Special to find out just why American 70s cars never took off in Britain. At the wheel of a Cadillac Coupe De Ville, a Lincoln Continental and a Buick Riviera in stunning Scottish surroundings, the three hosts undergo many mishaps and adventures before embarking on one of their toughest challenges yet.

programs.title: Footy Classified
programs.desc: Big names and agenda-setters lock horns on Footy Classified. Join Eddie McGuire, James Hird and Cal Twomey as they bring you footy's most confrontational program.

programs.title: Destination WA
programs.desc: On todays show, Trevor explores the Fishing Serrurier Island, uncovering crystal waters, rich marine life and rugged coastline beauty in an unforgettable WA adventure across the pristine offshore paradise. More adventures await across WA!
